name: Bowen Street Garage
painPoints: Closed weekends — customers with 9-5 jobs can't easily schedule
Basic appointment form on website but no real-time scheduling
No automated service reminders for returning customers
Small team (6-8) — phone time competes with wrench time
strengths: Andreas Miller: 2011 Gates/ASE Master Auto & L1 Technician of the Year
Specializes in Sprinter vans, Cummins, European diesel, 4x4
A+ BBB rating, no complaints on record
Free loaner vehicles — strong customer service focus
NAPA Auto Care partner, MWACA member
conversationStarters: Congrats on the ASE Master Technician award — that's a serious credential
Sprinter van and European diesel specialty is a niche most shops won't touch
suggestedApproach: Andreas is detail-oriented and values quality over gimmicks. Lead with the ASE award, show genuine respect for his expertise. Then: 'What happens when someone calls on Saturday and you're closed?' Voice bot for after-hours + automated service reminders for repeat customers.
